text:
This article is about the Evangelion from Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play. For the Evangelion from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Battle Orchestra, see Evangelion Unit-β.

 is an Evangelion appearing in the Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play. It was piloted by Hinata La Fayette Kojo.

Profile

Attribute: Fire 
Color: Gold Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.40
